# Lunar Coordinate Time (LTC/TCL) external reference.
# ORACLE A: Ashby & Patla 2024, AJ 167:149, doi:10.3847/1538-3881/ad643a
#           (arXiv:2402.11150). Published rate-term breakdown, transcribed.
# ORACLE B: JPL DE440 (de440s.bsp) via NAIF SPICE/spiceypy. Moon geocentric speed.
# Consumed by tests/lunar_coordinate_time_reference.rs. See the generator docstring.
#
# --- ORACLE A: Ashby & Patla 2024 published terms (us/day unless noted) ---
TERM L_G_dimensionless | 6.969290134e-10 | (1) | Table I -Phi0/c^2 (IAU TT defining)
TERM L_m_dimensionless | 3.13881e-11 | (1) | Table I -Phi0m/c^2 (Moon self-potential)
TERM L_G_us_per_day | 60.21466675776 | us/day | Earth-geoid TT term
TERM L_m_us_per_day | 2.71193184 | us/day | Moon self-potential term
TERM self_potential_net_us_per_day | 57.502734917759994 | us/day | (L_G - L_m): geoid minus Moon self-potential redshift
TERM secular_total_headline_us_per_day | 56.0199 | us/day | Eq.(35) f-averaged
TERM band_low_us_per_day | 56.0 | us/day | published band lower
TERM band_high_us_per_day | 59.0 | us/day | published band upper
#
